asins.title: ASINs to process
asins.description: One or more ASINs. If empty, the actor fetches active products from the portal API.

minSearchVolume.title: Min search volume
minSearchVolume.description: Ignore keywords whose Cerebro search volume is below this.

rankMin.title: Organic rank min
rankMin.description: Lower bound of the organic-rank window to keep (keywords where you already rank highly are excluded).

rankMax.title: Organic rank max
rankMax.description: Upper bound of the organic-rank window to keep (keywords you rank too poorly for are excluded).

highOppVolume.title: High-opportunity volume threshold
highOppVolume.description: Keywords at or above this volume can be flagged high_opportunity.

highOppRankMax.title: High-opportunity rank max
highOppRankMax.description: Keywords ranking at or better than this position can be flagged high_opportunity.

maxKeywords.title: Max keywords per ASIN
maxKeywords.description: Cap on keywords stored per ASIN per run.

maxCompetitorLookups.title: Max competitor lookups per ASIN
maxCompetitorLookups.description: How many competing ASINs to X-ray per ASIN.

deepCompetitors.title: Deep competitor X-ray (visit product pages)
deepCompetitors.description: When on, visit competitor product pages for richer data (slower).

weeklyPpcBudget.title: Weekly PPC budget ($) for plan allocation
weeklyPpcBudget.description: Budget used by the PPC plan generator to allocate spend across keywords.

productPrice.title: Your product price (cost-to-rank math)
productPrice.description: Your product's price, used in the cost-to-rank and ROI calculations.

loginWaitMinutes.title: Login handoff wait (minutes)
loginWaitMinutes.description: If the saved Helium 10 session is dead, the actor pauses on the login page this long so you can sign in via Live View.

brandBlocklist.title: Branded terms to exclude
brandBlocklist.description: Branded/competitor terms to drop from results.
